name: yve-agency
description: Build de assets do YVE Agency — Tailwind purgado + vendor self-hosted (FE-01).

scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:vendor
scripts.build:vendor: mkdir -p public/js/vendor && cp node_modules/alpinejs/dist/cdn.min.js public/js/vendor/alpine.min.js && cp node_modules/chart.js/dist/chart.umd.js public/js/vendor/chart.umd.min.js && cp node_modules/marked/marked.min.js public/js/vendor/marked.min.js && cp node_modules/dompurify/dist/purify.min.js public/js/vendor/purify.min.js
